html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

GenericPicked

Spotty Shrubs are Plants exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together. They are only found in the Sugarwood Memorial Park area which can only be accessed after buying an Iron Key from Sammy. Spotty Shrubs can be harvested to obtain Spotty Sprigs which are required to grind Spot Spice.

Trivia

  • The Spice of Strife Accomplishment is given for harvesting all 15 Spotty Shrubs in the park and grind the obtained Spotty Sprigs into Spot Spice in a single The Gorge match.

Gallery

  • The Sugarwood Memorial Park area containing Sugarwood Trees and Spotty Shrubs.
  • A Spotty Shrub growing in the park.
  • A Spotty Shrub that has been picked.
  • The Spice of Strife Accomplishment.

Spotty Shrubs are Plants exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together. They are only found in the Sugarwood Memorial Park area which can only be accessed after buying an Iron Key from Sammy. Spotty Shrubs can be harvested to obtain Spotty Sprigs which are required to grind Spot Spice.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Spice of Strife Accomplishment is given for harvesting all 15 Spotty Shrubs in the park and grind the obtained Spotty Sprigs into Spot Spice in a single The Gorge match.

'''Spotty Shrubs''' are [[Plants]] exclusive to [[The Gorge]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. They are only found in the Sugarwood Memorial Park area which can only be accessed after buying an [[Iron Key Gorge|Iron Key]] from [[Sammy]]. Spotty Shrubs can be harvested to obtain [[Spotty Sprig]]s which are required to grind [[Spot Spice]].

{{Clear}}
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* '''The Spice of Strife''' [[The Gorge#Accomplishments|Accomplishment]] is given for harvesting all 15 Spotty Shrubs in the park and grind the obtained Spotty Sprigs into Spot Spice in a single The Gorge match.
